extract: Meowth (Japanese: ニャース Nyarth) is a Normal-type Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves into Persian starting at level 28. In Alola, Meowth has a Dark-type regional form. It evolves into Alolan Persian when leveled up with high friendship. In Galar, Meowth has a Steel-type regional form. It evolves into Perrserker starting at level 28. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.) Kantonian Meowth can Gigantamax into Gigantamax Meowth if it has the Gigantamax Factor. Meowth with the Gigantamax Factor cannot evolve.
